---
title: "Environmental data"
output:
  github_document:
    toc: TRUE
---
```{r, include = FALSE}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(terra)
library(ggpubr)
library(algatr)
library(viridis)
library(vcfR)
library(hierfstat)
library(tigris)

devtools::load_all()
source(here("analysis", "admixture", "admixture.R"))
source(here("general_functions.R"))

# Set global options for caching
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  cache = TRUE,
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  result = FALSE
)
# Load the U.S. state boundaries data
ca <- get_ca()

coords <- get_coords(sf = TRUE)
```

# NLCD Imperviousness (All Years)
Data Source: https://www.mrlc.gov/data/nlcd-imperviousness-conus-all-years
```{r}
#nlcd_2016_impervious_l48_20210604
nlcd_2016 <- rast(here("data", "env", "nlcd_2016_impervious_l48_20210604", "nlcd_2016_impervious_l48_20210604.img"))
nlcd_descriptor_2016 <- rast(here("data", "env", "nlcd_2016_impervious_descriptor_l48_20210604", "nlcd_2016_impervious_descriptor_l48_20210604.img"))

nlcd_2001 <- rast(here("data", "env", "nlcd_2001_impervious_l48_20210604", "nlcd_2001_impervious_l48_20210604.img"))
nlcd_descriptor_2001 <- rast(here("data", "env", "nlcd_2001_impervious_descriptor_l48_20210604", "nlcd_2001_impervious_descriptor_l48_20210604.img"))

coords_nlcd <- st_transform(coords, st_crs(nlcd_2001))

format_nlcd <- function(nlcd, nlcd_descriptor, year){
  coords_nlcd <- st_transform(coords, st_crs(nlcd))

  nlcd_df <-
    extract(nlcd, coords_nlcd, xy = TRUE, ID = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(SampleID = coords_nlcd$SampleID) %>%
    rename(nlcd_imperviousness = Layer_1) %>%
    mutate(nlcd_imperviousness = as.numeric(nlcd_imperviousness), year = year)

  nlcd_descriptor_df <- 
    extract(nlcd_descriptor, coords_nlcd, xy = TRUE, ID = FALSE)%>%
    mutate(SampleID = coords_nlcd$SampleID, year = year) %>%
    rename(nlcd_imperviousness_class_names = Class_Names)

  return(list(nlcd = nlcd_df, descriptor = nlcd_descriptor_df))
}

nlcd_2001 <- format_nlcd(nlcd_2001, nlcd_descriptor_2001, year = 2001)
nlcd_2016 <- format_nlcd(nlcd_2016, nlcd_descriptor_2016, year = 2016)
nlcd <- bind_rows(nlcd_2001$nlcd, nlcd_2016$nlcd)
nlcd_descriptor <- bind_rows(nlcd_2001$descriptor, nlcd_2016$descriptor)
nlcd_dif <- 
nlcd %>% 
pivot_wider(names_from = year, values_from = nlcd_imperviousness) %>%
mutate(dif = `2016` - `2001`)

ggplot(nlcd) +
  geom_sf(data = st_transform(ca, st_crs(nlcd_descriptor_2001))) +
  geom_point(aes(x = x, y = y, col = log(nlcd_imperviousness))) +
  facet_wrap(~year) +
  theme_void() +
  scale_color_viridis(option = "plasma")

ggplot(nlcd_dif) +
  geom_sf(data = st_transform(ca, st_crs(nlcd_descriptor_2001))) +
  geom_point(aes(x = x, y = y, col = dif)) +
  theme_void() +
  scale_color_viridis(option = "plasma")

ggplot(nlcd_descriptor) +
  geom_sf(data = st_transform(ca, st_crs(nlcd_descriptor_2001))) +
  geom_point(aes(x = x, y = y, col = nlcd_imperviousness_class_names)) +
  facet_wrap(~year) +
  theme_void()
```

# Elevation
```{r}
path <- here("data", "env", "dem_z10.tif")
if (file.exists(path)){
  dem <- rast(path)
} else {
  dem <- elevatr::get_elev_raster(coords, z = 10, src = "aws")
  writeRaster(dem, path)
}
coords_dem <- st_transform(coords, st_crs(dem))
dem_df <- 
  extract(dem, coords_dem, ID = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(SampleID = coords_dem$SampleID) %>%
  rename(elevation = dem_z10)
```

# LANDFIRE Canopy Height (2016)
Data Source:
- Download link: https://landfire.gov/bulk/downloadfile.php?FNAME=US_200_mosaic-LF2016_EVH_200_CONUS.zip&TYPE=landfire
- Home: https://landfire.gov/version_download.php#
```{r}
# NOTE: Haven't figure out how to combine
evh <- rast(here("data", "env", "LF2016_EVH_200_CONUS", "Tif", "LC16_EVH_200.tif"))
#evh <- rast(here("data", "env", "US_105_EVH", "Tif", "us_105evh.tif"))
coords_evh <- st_transform(coords, st_crs(evh))
#coords_evh <- st_buffer(coords_evh, 100)
evh_df <- extract(evh, coords_evh, xy = TRUE, ID = FALSE)
evh_df <-
  evh_df %>%
  mutate(SampleID = coords_evh$SampleID) %>%
  mutate(
    simple = case_when(
      grepl("Developed", CLASSNAMES) ~ "Developed",
      grepl("Herb Height", CLASSNAMES) ~ "Herb",
      grepl("Tree Height", CLASSNAMES) ~ "Tree",
      grepl("Shrub Height", CLASSNAMES) ~ "Shrub",
      grepl("Sparse Vegetation Canopy", CLASSNAMES) ~ "Sparse Vegetation / Barren",
      grepl("Barren", CLASSNAMES) ~ "Sparse Vegetation / Barren",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    developed = case_when(
      grepl("Developed", CLASSNAMES) ~ CLASSNAMES,
      TRUE ~ NA
    ),
    herb_height = 
    as.numeric(case_when(
      grepl("Herb Height", CLASSNAMES) ~ str_extract(CLASSNAMES, "\\d+\\.?\\d*"),
      TRUE ~ NA
    )),
    tree_height = 
    as.numeric(case_when(
      grepl("Tree Height", CLASSNAMES) ~ str_extract(CLASSNAMES, "\\d+\\.?\\d*"),
      TRUE ~ NA
    )),
    shrub_height = 
    as.numeric(case_when(
      grepl("Shrub Height", CLASSNAMES) ~ str_extract(CLASSNAMES, "\\d+\\.?\\d*"),
      TRUE ~ NA
    ))
  ) %>%
  mutate(simple = factor(simple, levels = c("Developed", "Shrub", "Herb", "Tree", "Sparse Vegetation / Barren", "Other")))


ggplot(evh_df) +
  geom_sf(data = st_transform(ca, st_crs(evh))) +
  geom_point(aes(col = simple, x = x, y = y)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#7ed17e", "#009488", "#bf85e2", "#d1925f", "gray")) +
  theme_void()

ggplot(evh_df) +
  geom_sf(data = st_transform(ca, st_crs(evh))) +
  geom_point(aes(col = developed, x = x, y = y)) +
  theme_void()

ggplot(evh_df) +
  geom_sf(data = st_transform(ca, st_crs(evh))) +
  geom_point(aes(col = CLASSNAMES, x = x, y = y)) +
  theme_void()

# There are many different developed levels
evh_df %>% filter(grepl("Developed", CLASSNAMES)) %>% count(CLASSNAMES)

# creating binary developed variable - counting all developed types as developed (check this but there are only a few case of Medium/High intensity development in the dataset)
evh_df <-
  evh_df %>%
  mutate(developed_bin = grepl("Developed", CLASSNAMES))

ggplot(evh_df) +
  geom_sf(data = st_transform(ca, st_crs(evh))) +
  geom_point(aes(col = developed_bin, x = x, y = y)) +
  theme_void()

evh_df <- 
  evh_df %>%
  rename(
    LF_evh = CLASSNAMES,
    LF_evh_simple = simple,
    LF_evh_developed = developed,
    LF_evh_herb_height = herb_height,
    LF_evh_tree_height = tree_height,
    LF_evh_shrub_height = shrub_height,
    LF_evh_developed_bin = developed_bin
  )
```

# Climate data
```{r}
algatr::load_algatr_example()
coords_ca <- st_transform(coords, st_crs(CA_env))
CA_env_df <- 
  extract(CA_env, coords_ca, ID = FALSE) %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  mutate(SampleID = coords$SampleID)
```

# Bind and export
```{r}
env_df <-
  get_coords() %>%
  left_join(dem_df) %>%
  left_join(dplyr::select(nlcd_df, -x, -y)) %>%
  left_join(dplyr::select(nlcd_descriptor_df, -x, -y)) %>%
  left_join(dplyr::select(evh_df, -x, -y)) %>%
  left_join(CA_env_df)

head(env_df)

write_csv(env_df, here("data", "env", "envdata.csv"))

# join together raster data
dem_crop <- crop(dem, st_transform(ca, st_crs(dem)))
dem_crop <- mask(dem_crop, st_transform(ca, st_crs(dem)))
dem_proj <- project(dem_crop, "EPSG:3310")
CA_env_crop <- crop(CA_env, st_transform(ca, st_crs(CA_env)))
CA_env_crop <- mask(CA_env_crop, st_transform(ca, st_crs(CA_env)))
CA_env_proj <- project(rast(CA_env_crop), "EPSG:3310")
CA_env_proj <- resample(CA_env_proj, dem_proj)
envstack <- c(dem_proj, CA_env_proj)
plot(envstack)

writeRaster(envstack, here("data", "env", "envstack.tif"))

```
